seo.title: DSCR Loans for Investors | Rental Income Financing | Green Street Capital
seo.description: DSCR mortgage programs for real estate investors. Qualify using property cash flow. NY, NJ, FL, PA. NMLS #2066586.

hero.heading: DSCR Loans for Investors
hero.subheading: Investment property financing that focuses on the property’s debt-service coverage—not only personal W-2 income.

intro.heading: What Is a DSCR Loan?
paragraphs: Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) loans evaluate whether rental income is sufficient relative to the mortgage payment. They are popular with investors who want to scale portfolios without traditional employment underwriting on every file.
Guidelines vary by lender for short-term rentals, multi-unit properties, and cash-out refinance.
bullets: Investors with complex personal tax returns

sidebar.heading: Investor Focus
sidebar.body: We review rent estimates, expenses, and program overlays so you understand leverage and cash-flow risk before you close.

programs.title: DSCR Purchase
programs.description: Acquire rentals using property income ratios.

programs.title: DSCR Refinance
programs.description: Rate/term or cash-out subject to DSCR and LTV.

programs.title: Multi-Unit Investments
programs.description: Options for 2–4 unit and select larger properties via partners.

programs.title: Short-Term Rentals
programs.description: Where lenders allow STR income methodologies.

faqs.question: Do I need to show personal income?
faqs.answer: Many DSCR programs emphasize property cash flow; residual requirements still vary by lender.

faqs.question: Can first-time investors use DSCR?
faqs.answer: Some lenders allow it; experience and reserves requirements differ.

cta.heading: Structure your next investment loan
cta.body: Share the property address and rent projections with a loan officer.
